name: man
description: Format and display the on-line manual pages

name: -C
options.description: Specify the configuration file to use

name: -M
options.description: Specify the list of directories to search (colon separated)

name: -P
options.description: Specify the pager program

name: -B
options.description: Specify which browser to use for HTML files

name: -H
options.description: Specify a command that renders HTML files as text

name: -S
options.description: Specify a colon-separated list of manual sections to search

name: -a
options.description: Open every matching page instead of just the first

name: -c
options.description: Reformat the source page, even when an up-to-date cat-page exists

name: -d
options.description: Don't actually display the pages (dry run)

name: -D
options.description: Both display and print debugging info

name: -f
options.description: Equivalent to `whatis`

name: -F
--preformat
options.description: Format only, do not display

name: -h
options.description: Print a help message and exit

name: -k
options.description: Equivalent to apropos

name: -K
options.description: Search for a given string in all pages

name: -m
options.description: Specify an alternate set of pages to search based on the system name given

name: -p
options.description: Specify the sequence of preprocessors to run before nroff or troff

name: -t
options.description: Use `/usr/bin/groff -Tps -mandoc -c` to format the page

name: -w
--path
options.description: Print the location of files that would be displayed

name: -W
options.description: Print file locations, one per line

generators.js_source:
async(e,t)=>{let n=e[e.length-1],s=Date.now();if(s-Z>je&&(A.clear(),Z=s),!D&&A.size===0){D=!0;let{stdout:i}=await t({command:"man",args:["-k","."]}),r=new Set;for(let o of i.split(`
`)){let c=o.indexOf(" - "),f=o.slice(0,c),l=o.slice(c+3)||"Manual page";l=l[0].toLocaleUpperCase()+l.slice(1);let a=f.split(", ");for(let u of a){let h=u.lastIndexOf("("),m=u.slice(0,h),p=u.slice(h);if(r.has(m))continue;r.add(m);let g={name:m,description:`${p} ${l}`,icon:"fig://icon?type=string"},v=A.get(m[0]);v?v.push(g):A.set(m[0],[g])}}D=!1}else D&&await new Promise(i=>setTimeout(()=>i(),4e3));return A.get(n[0]||"a")||[]}
